templates.summary: Associative fillet surface between two surfaces with typed radius and trim-mode slots.

trim_mode.description: Whether the input surfaces are trimmed back to the fillet surface.

templates.notes: DCM/associativity census coverage entry for SURFFILLET. Real operation parameters from AcDbAssocFilletSurfaceActionBody include two input surfaces, two pick points, radius, and trim mode; this governed template only exposes the scalar command-line parameters as typed slots. Marked headless_safe=false because this surface workflow is attended full_autocad, not certified for accoreconsole.
